debug_info.goal:
case refine_4.true
n : ℕ
S : Error.Dist n
a b : Error.Agent n
σ : List (Error.Call n)
c : Error.Agent n
o : Error.maxOne n (Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ)
a_not_know_before_t :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
a_not_know_before_f :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false)))
a_knows_after_t : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
T : Error.Dist n
τ : Error.OSequence n
same_len : Error.OSequence.length n τ = σ.length
C : Error.Call n
not_in_callee :
  (b, false) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ ∨
    (b, false) ∈ Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩
equ :
  Error.equiv n (Error.OSequence.length n ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩) a
    (S,
      ⟨⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩,
        Error.resultSet._proof_1 n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩)
    (T, ⟨τ, ⋯⟩)
role_C : Error.Role.Caller = Error.roleOfIn n a C
same_contrib :
  (Error.contribSet n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩ (Error.Call.normal n a c)).2 =
    (Error.contribSet n T τ C).2
h_b : @S b = true
⊢ @T b = true

failed_attempts:
simp [eval, stubbornness] at this
              exact this

simp only [eval]
              have h := indistinguishable_then_same_values ⟨same_len.symm, equ⟩
              have hS := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp [eval] at hS
              rw [stubbornness] at hS
              simp_all

have know_T := a_knows_after_t T ⟨C :: τ.1, by cases C <;> simp [maxOne] at * <;> aesop⟩
                (by simp [OSequence.length]; omega)
                (by unfold equiv; simp [role_C.symm, equ, same_contrib])
              simp [eval, stubbornness] at know_T
              exact know_T

have knows_in_T := a_knows_after_t T ⟨C :: τ.1, ?_⟩ ?_ ?_
              · simp only [eval] at knows_in_T
                rw [stubbornness _ _ rfl] at knows_in_T
                exact knows_in_T
              · simp [OSequence.length, same_len]
              · unfold equiv
                refine ⟨equ, ?_, ?_⟩
                · exact role_C.symm
                · simp [role_C.symm, same_contrib, Call.pair]
                  cases C <;> simp_all [roleOfIn]
              · cases C <;> simp_all [maxOne, roleOfIn]
                all_goals exact Sequence.maxOne_of_errFree (Sequence.maxOne_cons o)

simp only [equiv, OSequence.length_def] at h_know
              have role_eq : roleOfIn a (Call.normal a c) = roleOfIn a C := by simp [← role_C]
              have h_know' := h_know ⟨equ, role_eq, by simp [role_eq]; exact ⟨same_contrib, by
                cases C <;> simp_all [roleOfIn, Call.pair]⟩⟩
              simp only [eval, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h_know'
              rw [stubbornness _ _ rfl] at h_know'
              exact h_know'

simp only [eval] at this
              rw [this]
              have know_transfer := equiv_then_know_same equ ((b, true) @ b)
              have a_knew : eval S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ (K a ((b, true) @ b)) := by
                simp only [eval, stubbornness, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def]
                intro T' τ' same_len' equ'
                have goal := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
                simp_all
              rw [know_transfer] at a_knew
              exact (true_of_knowldege a_knew)

rw [stubbornness _ _ same_len] at this
              exact this

simp only [eval] at from_eq
                have prev_know : eval S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ (K a ((b, true) @ b)) := by
                  intro T' τ' same_len' equ'
                  rw [stubbornness]; exact h_b
                rw [from_eq] at prev_know
                exact true_of_knowldege prev_know
              rw [stubbornness _ τ (by simp [OSequence.length]; exact same_len)] at this
              exact this

simp only [stubbornness] at this
              exact this
